allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/signin" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@hardcompare.com","password":"admin123"}' -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "LOGIN OK"; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty user } catch { $err = $_.Exception.Response; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($err.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Eroare: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })
